description_long: This sconce features a long, rectangular body with a deep, narrow channel running along its length, likely designed to house a linear light source. The exterior is finished in a dark, metallic or painted material, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The inner channel appears glossy and reflective, possibly lined with glass or polished metal to enhance light diffusion. The overall form is minimalist, with sharp, clean edges and no visible fasteners or embellishments. Its proportions suggest it is intended for horizontal wall mounting, providing a wide spread of illumination. The design is utilitarian yet elegant, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as building facades, parking garages, or public walkways.
description: A long, rectangular, dark-finished sconce with a glossy inner channel, designed for modern urban settings. Its minimalist form and reflective interior suggest efficient, wide light distribution.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow, deep channel and the rectangular profile.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the sconce and the open channel running along its top.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, mirroring view 0 with the same narrow, deep channel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the elongated rectangular form and open channel.
attribute_fixture_design: Minimalist and modern, with a sleek rectangular profile and a glossy inner channel for efficient light diffusion. The design is clean and unadorned, emphasizing function and contemporary aesthetics.
